query:
UPDATE books SET coverImage = CASE title
  WHEN 'Dangerous Calling: Why the Office of Pastor Is Not for Everyone' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6092_02762c22.jpeg'
  WHEN 'The Hidden Life of a Pastor: Tending Your Soul While Tending the Flock' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6093_69683fc2.jpeg'
  WHEN 'The First Flock: The Church''s Calling to Care for Pastors and Their Families' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6094_d1e99321.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Earthen Vessels: Why Our Bodies Matter to Our Faith' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6095_9d4f09c6.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Preach the Word: The Primacy of Expository Preaching in the Local Church' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6096_34df9ecb.jpeg'
  WHEN 'The Undershepherd: Pastoral Leadership, Authority, and the Care of God''s People' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6097_f4edcd5b.jpeg'
  WHEN 'The Pruning: Church Decline, Faithful Endurance, and the Promise of Renewal' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6098_b927c828.jpeg'
  WHEN 'One Body, Many Churches: A Theology of Unity for a Fractured Church' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6099_8f38bb34.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Necessary Words: A Pastoral Theology of Courage and Difficult Conversations' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6100_07bd4e9d.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Sent Into the City: The Church''s Calling to Its Neighborhood and World' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6101_0d5c30be.jpeg'
  WHEN 'To the Ends of the Earth: Global Mission, National Partnership, and the Sent Church' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6102_d826fb33.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Faithful in Exile: Pastoral Leadership and the Church''s Witness in a Post-Christian Age' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6103_a98aa550.jpeg'
  WHEN 'Common Grace: What Pastors Learn When They Listen to the World' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6104_fd2f3ac0.jpeg'
  WHEN 'The Unfinished Church: Calling, Vision, and the Future God Is Building' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6105_5b810d75.jpeg'
  ELSE coverImage
END WHERE author = 'James Bell';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R8Hw4VBpxrrDge.root --database KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG --execute UPDATE books SET coverImage = CASE title
  WHEN 'Dangerous Calling: Why the Office of Pastor Is Not for Everyone' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6092_02762c22.jpeg'

  WHEN 'Common Grace: What Pastors Learn When They Listen to the World' THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663366638960/KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG/IMG_6104_fd2f3ac0.jpeg'
